title: Conservative Values
questions: What does it mean to be conservative? Is it good or bad to be conservative? Why?
What does it mean to be liberal? Is it good or bad to be liberal? Why?
What recently became acceptable in your country? Do you have any tattoos? Do your parents? Do young people wear revealing clothing? Was that OK in the past?
How do countries differ in what is acceptable? What is accepted in the US/Europe, but not in your country? Do you think the US and Europe are too liberal? Why or why not?
What do you think will be acceptable for your children? What about your grandchildren? Do you think all societies become more liberal as time passes?
What countries are the most conservative?
Which countries are the most liberal?
How do people's values change with age?
Are you liberal or conservative? Why?
Do you prefer people who are more liberal or conservative? Why?
